meta.title: Identity & KYC Verification — FinPay Africa
meta.description: Automated KYC and AML screening for fast, compliant onboarding of individuals and businesses across Africa.

hero.headline:
Know your customer.
Protect your business.
hero.sub: Automated KYC, AML screening, and identity verification — built for African ID types. Onboard in seconds. Stay compliant forever.

items.title: Multi-document ID support
items.body: National IDs, passports, driver licences, and voter cards — from 54 African countries — verified with AI-powered OCR.

items.title: Liveness detection
items.body: Passive liveness checks in under 3 seconds. Prevents spoofing with printed photos or recorded videos.

items.title: AML & sanctions screening
items.body: Real-time screening against 50+ global sanction lists, PEP databases, and adverse media — on every onboarding and transaction.

items.title: Risk-scored results
items.body: Every verification returns a risk score with detailed reason codes, so your compliance team can make fast, auditable decisions.

items.title: No-code + API
items.body: Drop in our hosted KYC flow with one line of code, or build a fully custom journey using our headless Verification API.

items.title: Audit-ready records
items.body: Every check is stored with timestamp, evidence, and decision log. One-click export for regulator requests.

cta.headline:
Compliant onboarding
in minutes, not months
cta.sub: Trusted by licensed fintechs and banks across Africa.
cta.trust: GDPR & NDPR compliant · SOC 2 Type II · Data stays in-region
